/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_storage.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_storage.dir/test_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_storage.dir/__/src/storage/in_memory_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_storage.dir/__/src/storage/wal_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_storage.dir/__/src/protocol/resp.cpp.o -o test_storage  ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread ../lib/libgtest.a
